label: VR-Therapy Integration Boundary
summary: Clinical and immersive interaction terms form a durable cycle that persists across publication years.
topologySignal: Persistent H1 cycle over three adjacent yearly windows.
interpretation: Indicates a stable bridge where methods and application outcomes mutually reinforce.

label: Playful Health Early Boundary
summary: An initially weak cycle becomes stronger with additional motivational constructs.
topologySignal: Moderate H1 persistence with rising triadic closure.
interpretation: Suggests concept maturation rather than abrupt novelty.

label: Speculative Interaction Non-Integrating Boundary
summary: Terms co-occur briefly but fail to sustain structural loops in subsequent periods.
topologySignal: Short-lived H1 cycle with low triadic closure.
interpretation: Highlights boundaries that remain conceptually adjacent but structurally disconnected.
